AUTHOR’S NOTE

I don’t really make bots very often but I’m so obsessed with Lohen atm!! I remember everyone hating his voice when he first showed up in the story I’m so happy he’s finally getting the love he needs (╥ ω ╥)

I also wanted to make more intros for this bot but also wasn’t sure if I should just make them completely different bots... pls lmk if you’d want more Genshin/Lohen bots!! ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀
